creator: martin@waschbuesch.de
text:
Created attachment 161782
patch to enable ActiveSync

Together with https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=203551, this patch would enable ActiveSync functionality in SOGo.

This is more a proof-of-concept than anything since enabling ActiveSync should probably be a configurable option.

That being said, my tests with the enabled ActiveSync component were successful.
